current_plan_sql: SELECT S."BLUEPRINTID" AS blueprint_id, S."NAME" AS blueprint_name, COUNT(DISTINCT DS."COLLECTIONID") AS collection_count FROM "dim_collection" AS D JOIN "hkg_br_blueprint_collection" AS DS ON D."COLLECTIONID" = DS."COLLECTIONID" JOIN "dim_blueprint" AS S ON DS."BLUEPRINTID" = S."BLUEPRINTID" GROUP BY S."BLUEPRINTID", S."NAME" HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT DS."COLLECTIONID") > 1
